name: stack-add of a real namespace remains a declared stack entry rather than being treated as a technology
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a platform" --stack-add k8s --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(c["stack"].map{|e|e["namespace"]}==["k8s"] && c["family_activated"]==[] ? 0:1)' && echo namespace-stays-stack 1>&2
